questions.question: Choose the correct one-word substitute for: A person who believes that everything in life is determined by fate
questions.explanation: A) Fatalist (noun) – a person who believes that events in life are predetermined by fate भाग्यवादी / नियतिवादी • Realist (noun) – a person who accepts life as it is यथार्थवादी • Idealist (noun) – a person guided by ideals आदर्शवादी • Pragmatist (noun) – a person guided by practical considerations व्यवहारवादी

questions.question: Identify the part of the sentence that contains a grammatical error. A. The main affect B. of the new policy C. will be an increase D. in productivity.
questions.explanation: A) affect' के बदले 'effect' का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि यहाँ अर्थ result / outcome (परिणाम) का है और इस अर्थ में effect (noun) आता है, जबकि affect सामान्यतः verb (प्रभाव डालना) के रूप में प्रयोग होता है; जैसे— The effect of the policy was remarkable. • 'effect' will be used instead of 'affect' because the meaning here is result/outcome, and in this meaning effect is the correct noun, whereas affect is mainly used as a verb; Like— The effect of the policy was remarkable.

questions.question: Fill in the blank with the most appropriate conjunction: He neither attended the seminar _____ submitted his report on time.
questions.explanation: C) ‘nor’ का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि entire structure में ‘neither … nor’ pairing बनती है, जो दो negative alternatives को जोड़ती है। वाक्य में दो कार्य — seminar attend करना और report submit करना — दोनों के न होने की बात कही जा रही है, इसलिए ‘nor’ सबसे उचित conjunction है। • ‘nor’ should be used because it correctly completes the correlative conjunction pair ‘neither … nor’, which is used to link two negative ideas. The sentence expresses that he did not do either of the two actions (attending the seminar or submitting the report), making ‘nor’ the most appropriate choice.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate antonym of the word: Gregarious
questions.explanation: B) Gregarious (adjective) – Fond of company; sociable; outgoing; friendly; convivial. मिलनसार / संग-साथ पसंद करने वाला Antonym: Solitary (adjective) – Preferring to be alone; unsociable; withdrawn. एकांतप्रिय / अकेला रहने वाला • Sociable (adjective) – Enjoying the company of others. मिलनसार • Friendly (adjective) – Kind, pleasant, warm. मित्रतापूर्ण • Outgoing (adjective) – Extroverted, social, cheerful. हंसमुख / मेलजोल पसंद करने वाला

questions.question: Select the most appropriate antonym of the word: Ineffable
questions.explanation: A) Ineffable (adjective) – Too great to be expressed in words, indescribable अकथनीय, अवर्णनीय Antonym: Expressible (adjective) – Able to be stated, articulated, communicated, conveyed, described व्यक्त करने योग्य • Inarticulate (adjective) – Unable to express clearly अस्पष्ट बोलने वाला • Unfathomable (adjective) – Incomprehensible, deep, immeasurable अगम्य, अपार • Indescribable (adjective) – Too extraordinary to describe वर्णनातीत

questions.question: Identify the part of the sentence that contains a grammatical error. A. The new manager B. is responsible of C the entire marketing D. campaign.
questions.explanation: B) 'is responsible of' के बदले 'is responsible for' का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि adjective responsible के बाद सही preposition for लगता है; जैसे— She is responsible for the project. • 'is responsible for' will be used instead of 'is responsible of' because the correct preposition that follows responsible is for; Like— She is responsible for the project.

questions.question: Rearrange the following sentences to form a meaningful and grammatically correct paragraph: P. She used her little trowel to loosen the rich, black dirt. Q. She made a shallow hole and carefully lowered a little seed into it. R. She would now watch for the emergence of the first small sprout. S. The ground was saturated by a soft stream of water, signifying the possibility of fresh life.
questions.explanation: A) P, Q, S, R She used her little trowel to loosen the rich, black dirt.She made a shallow hole and carefully lowered a little seed into it.The ground was saturated by a soft stream of water, signifying the possibility of fresh life.She would now watch for the emergence of the first small sprout. Explanation Sentence P सबसे पहले आता है because soil को loosen करना planting का पहला step होता है। यहाँ used और loosen verbs action की शुरुआत दिखाते हैं, इसलिए यह paragraph की opening बनता है। Sentence Q next आता है because मिट्टी ढीली करने के बाद ही hole बनाया जाता है और seed डाला जाता है। यहाँ action logically P के बाद follow करता है। Sentence S इसके बाद आता है क्योंकि seed डालने के बाद जमीन को water किया जाता है। was saturated condition बताता है और signifying water से new life की possibility बनती है। Sentence R last आता है because sprout को watch करना future action है। would now time connector है जो बताता है कि planting और watering के बाद next step waiting है। Sentence P comes first because loosening the soil is the initial step before planting. The verbs used and loosen show the beginning of the action. Sentence Q comes next because after the soil is loosened, a hole is made and the seed is placed. Sentence S follows because watering the soil happens after planting. The phrase was saturated describes the condition of the ground, and signifying acts as a cause-effect connector, showing the possibility of new life. Sentence R comes last because watching for a sprout is a future action. The words would now work as time connectors, indicating the final stage of the process. Therefore, the correct order is P → Q → S → R.

questions.question: Choose the correctly spelt word:
questions.explanation: A) The correctly spelt word is Delusion which means “a false belief or impression” भ्रम / भ्रमित धारणा।

questions.question: Select the most appropriate synonym of the word: Nadir
questions.explanation: D) Nadir (noun) – lowest point, depth, rock-bottom, base, pit. सबसे निचला बिंदु Synonym: Low point (noun) – lowest stage or condition, bottom level. निम्नतम स्तर • Apex (noun) – top, summit, highest point. शिखर • Zenith (noun) – highest point, climax, culmination. चरम • Peak (noun) – summit, top, height. चोटी

questions.question: Fill in the blank with the most appropriate idiom: Despite numerous setbacks, she remained optimistic and continued to ______.
options: keep her nose to the grindstone
questions.explanation: B) keep her nose to the grindstone – to continue working hard despite difficulties कठिनाइयों के बावजूद मेहनत जारी रखना • turn over a new leaf – to start behaving in a better way नया सुधारात्मक आरंभ करना • throw caution to the wind – to act without worrying about risk जोखिम की परवाह न करना • pull the plug – to stop or discontinue something किसी काम को बंद कर देना

questions.question: Read the following passage and answer the questions based on it: Online purchasing, which combines unmatched ease with a distinct set of disadvantages, has completely changed how consumers behave. Accessibility is its main benefit; customers may explore and buy things from almost anywhere at any time, and there is frequently a greater selection than in physical stores. Important lures include competitive pricing, made possible by internet retailers' reduced overhead, and the simplicity of comparing prices from several providers. However, there are significant drawbacks to online shopping's virtual nature. Delivery-related discontent may result from the inability to personally inspect things before purchase. Concerns over shipping delays, unstated expenses, and the effects of packaging and transportation on the environment are becoming more widespread. Additionally, the individualised customer service experience may be weakened by a lack of human interaction. What is the primary advantage of online purchasing according to the text?
options: It allows for in-person inspection of products
It provides easy access to a wider selection of items from anywhere at any time
It offers higher prices than physical stores
It eliminates the need for shipping
questions.explanation: B) It provides easy access to a wider selection of items from anywhere at any time ‘Easy access to a wider selection of items from anywhere at any time’ का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि passage में online purchasing की मुख्य विशेषता accessibility बताई गई है, जहाँ लोग किसी भी स्थान और समय पर अधिक विकल्पों के साथ सामान खरीद सकते हैं। इसलिए यह विकल्प संदर्भानुसार सबसे उपयुक्त है। • ‘Easy access to a wider selection of items from anywhere at any time’ should be used because the text highlights accessibility as the main advantage, noting that consumers can browse and purchase products anytime and from almost anywhere, with more variety than physical stores. Thus, this is the most accurate choice.

questions.question: Read the following passage and answer the questions based on it: Online purchasing, which combines unmatched ease with a distinct set of disadvantages, has completely changed how consumers behave. Accessibility is its main benefit; customers may explore and buy things from almost anywhere at any time, and there is frequently a greater selection than in physical stores. Important lures include competitive pricing, made possible by internet retailers' reduced overhead, and the simplicity of comparing prices from several providers. However, there are significant drawbacks to online shopping's virtual nature. Delivery-related discontent may result from the inability to personally inspect things before purchase. Concerns over shipping delays, unstated expenses, and the effects of packaging and transportation on the environment are becoming more widespread. Additionally, the individualised customer service experience may be weakened by a lack of human interaction. What is one of the key benefits of online shopping in terms of pricing?
options: Higher prices due to store overhead costs
Competitive pricing due to lower overhead costs for online retailers
Fixed prices with no possibility of comparison
Prices that remain constant across all platforms
questions.explanation: B) Competitive pricing due to lower overhead costs for online retailers ‘Competitive pricing due to lower overhead costs for online retailers’ का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि passage में बताया गया है कि online retailers के पास कम overhead expenses होते हैं, जिसके कारण वे competitive prices प्रदान कर पाते हैं। इसलिए यह विकल्प संदर्भ के अनुसार सबसे उपयुक्त है। • ‘Competitive pricing due to lower overhead costs for online retailers’ should be used because the text states that reduced overhead enables online sellers to offer more competitive prices, making this the most accurate choice.

questions.question: Read the following passage and answer the questions based on it: Online purchasing, which combines unmatched ease with a distinct set of disadvantages, has completely changed how consumers behave. Accessibility is its main benefit; customers may explore and buy things from almost anywhere at any time, and there is frequently a greater selection than in physical stores. Important lures include competitive pricing, made possible by internet retailers' reduced overhead, and the simplicity of comparing prices from several providers. However, there are significant drawbacks to online shopping's virtual nature. Delivery-related discontent may result from the inability to personally inspect things before purchase. Concerns over shipping delays, unstated expenses, and the effects of packaging and transportation on the environment are becoming more widespread. Additionally, the individualised customer service experience may be weakened by a lack of human interaction. What is a significant drawback of online shopping mentioned in the text?
options: The inability to inspect products before purchasing
questions.explanation: B) The inability to inspect products before purchasing ‘The inability to inspect products before purchasing’ का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि passage में स्पष्ट रूप से बताया गया है कि online shopping की virtual nature के कारण ग्राहक वस्तुओं को हाथ से जांच नहीं पाते, जिससे dissatisfaction हो सकती है। इसलिए यह विकल्प संदर्भानुसार सबसे उपयुक्त है। • ‘The inability to inspect products before purchasing’ should be used because the text notes that the virtual nature of online shopping prevents customers from physically examining items, which can lead to dissatisfaction. Thus, this is the most accurate choice.

questions.question: Read the following passage and answer the questions based on it: Online purchasing, which combines unmatched ease with a distinct set of disadvantages, has completely changed how consumers behave. Accessibility is its main benefit; customers may explore and buy things from almost anywhere at any time, and there is frequently a greater selection than in physical stores. Important lures include competitive pricing, made possible by internet retailers' reduced overhead, and the simplicity of comparing prices from several providers. However, there are significant drawbacks to online shopping's virtual nature. Delivery-related discontent may result from the inability to personally inspect things before purchase. Concerns over shipping delays, unstated expenses, and the effects of packaging and transportation on the environment are becoming more widespread. Additionally, the individualised customer service experience may be weakened by a lack of human interaction. What are some growing concerns related to the environmental impact of online shopping?
options: Higher fuel consumption from physical stores
questions.explanation: B) Concerns over shipping delays Concerns over shipping delays’ का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि passage में online shopping के virtual nature से जुड़े कई issues बताए गए हैं, जिनमें shipping delays और packaging व transportation से होने वाले environmental effects शामिल हैं। इसलिए यह विकल्प संदर्भ के अनुसार सबसे उपयुक्त है। • ‘Concerns over shipping delays’ should be used because the text mentions growing concerns linked to delivery issues along with environmental impacts caused by packaging and transportation. Thus, this is the most contextually suitable choice.

questions.question: Read the following passage and answer the questions based on it: Online purchasing, which combines unmatched ease with a distinct set of disadvantages, has completely changed how consumers behave. Accessibility is its main benefit; customers may explore and buy things from almost anywhere at any time, and there is frequently a greater selection than in physical stores. Important lures include competitive pricing, made possible by internet retailers' reduced overhead, and the simplicity of comparing prices from several providers. However, there are significant drawbacks to online shopping's virtual nature. Delivery-related discontent may result from the inability to personally inspect things before purchase. Concerns over shipping delays, unstated expenses, and the effects of packaging and transportation on the environment are becoming more widespread. Additionally, the individualised customer service experience may be weakened by a lack of human interaction. What aspect of the customer experience may be weakened by online shopping?
options: The ability to compare prices easily
Personalized customer service due to lack of human interaction
questions.explanation: B) Personalized customer service due to lack of human interaction ‘Personalized customer service due to lack of human interaction’ का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि passage में बताया गया है कि online shopping में human interaction कम हो जाने से individualized customer service कमजोर पड़ सकती है। इसलिए यह विकल्प संदर्भानुसार सबसे उपयुक्त है। • ‘Personalized customer service due to lack of human interaction’ should be used because the text states that the lack of human interaction may weaken the individualized customer service experience. Thus, this is the most accurate and context-appropriate choice.

questions.question: Choose the correctly spelt word:
questions.explanation: B) The correctly spelt word is Millennium which means “a period of one thousand years” एक हज़ार वर्षों की अवधि।

questions.question: Choose the correct one-word substitute for: The art of beautiful handwriting.
questions.explanation: A) Calligraphy (noun) – the art of beautiful handwriting सुन्दर लेखन कला • Orthography (noun) – correct spelling प्रणाली सही वर्तनी प्रणाली • Lexicography (noun) – the practice of compiling dictionaries शब्दकोश निर्माण कला • Etymology (noun) – the study of word origins शब्द–व्युत्पत्ति विज्ञान

questions.question: Select the most appropriate synonym of the word: Glib
questions.explanation: C) Glib (adjective) – Fluent but often insincere or superficial in speech चालाकी से या आसानी से बोलने वाला (कभी-कभी असत्य/ऊपरी) Synonym: Articulate (adjective) – Fluent, eloquent, clear-spoken, expressive, well-spoken स्पष्ट बोलने वाला / प्रभावशाली • Sincere (adjective) – Genuine, honest, heartfelt ईमानदार, सच्चा • Forthright (adjective) – Direct, straightforward, candid स्पष्टवादी • Dispassionate (adjective) – Unemotional, impartial, unbiased निर्पेक्ष, भावनारहित

questions.question: Change the following sentence into the Active form. Let the documents be submitted to the head of the department by the end of the week.
options: You should submit the documents to the head of the department by the end of the week.
Submit the documents to the head of the department by the end of the week.
The documents will be submitted to the head of the department by the end of the week.
Let the head of the department submit the documents by the end of the week.
questions.explanation: B) Submit the documents to the head of the department by the end of the week. Active से Passive Voice में बदलने के लिए, Active वाक्य का Object Passive वाक्य का Subject बन जाता है और Verb को Tense के अनुसार Passive रूप में बदला जाता है। Passive वाक्य में “Let the documents be submitted…” के रूप में documents Object है और Verb Passive Imperative रूप “be submitted” है। इसे Active Imperative में बदलने पर Verb का रूप Submit (Imperative Active) हो जाता है और Object documents वही रहता है, जबकि शेष वाक्य संरचना समान रहती है। अंत में “by the end of the week” समय दर्शाता है और वहीं रहता है। To change a sentence from Passive to Active Voice, the object of the passive sentence remains the object in the active structure if it is an imperative sentence. The passive form “be submitted” (Imperative Passive) changes to “Submit” (Imperative Active). The time expression “by the end of the week” is retained at the end of the sentence.

questions.question: Select the option that expresses the given sentence in indirect voice. The student said, "I have been practicing for the competition for months, but I am still nervous, as the other competitors are very skilled."
options: The student said that he has been practicing for the competition for months, but he is still nervous, as the other competitors are very skilled.
The student said that he had been practicing for the competition for months, but he was still nervous, as the other competitors were very skilled.
The student said that he had been practicing for the competition for months, but he is still nervous, as the other competitors are very skilled.
The student said that he was practicing for the competition for months, but he was still nervous, as the other competitors were very skilled.
questions.explanation: B) The student said that he had been practicing for the competition for months, but he was still nervous, as the other competitors were very skilled. Direct से Indirect Speech में बदलते समय Reporting Verb said Past में है, इसलिए Reported Speech का Tense भी Backshift होकर बदलता है। Direct वाक्य में “I have been practicing…” Present Perfect Continuous है, जो Indirect में Past Perfect Continuous (had been practicing) में बदलता है। इसी प्रकार “I am still nervous” में am Past में was बनता है और “competitors are very skilled” में are Past में were हो जाता है। Pronoun “I” संदर्भ के अनुसार he में परिवर्तित होता है। To convert from Direct to Indirect Speech, because the reporting verb is in past form (said), present perfect continuous changes to past perfect continuous, present continuous changes to past continuous or simple past depending on context, and present verb “are” changes to “were”. The pronoun “I” changes to “he” to maintain consistency.

questions.question: Which of the following sentences uses the word "park" with the same meaning as in the following sentence? "We decided to spend the afternoon playing in the park."
options: The old car was difficult to park.
The kids ran to the park to play on the swings.
She learned to park her car in a very small space.
Do not park your vehicle here.
questions.explanation: B) Highlighted वाक्य में ‘park’ का अर्थ है — बच्चों के खेलने और लोगों के घूमने-फिरने की जगह (public recreational area)। विकल्प B में भी ‘park’ का उपयोग उसी अर्थ में हुआ है — बच्चों के खेलने की जगह। इसलिए यह same meaning का सही उदाहरण है। In the highlighted sentence, ‘park’ refers to a recreational public area with playground or open space. Option B uses ‘park’ in the same sense — a place where kids play. Thus, option B matches the same meaning.

questions.question: Choose the correct meaning of the idiom: Chalk and cheese
options: Things that are opposites or completely different
questions.explanation: A) Chalk and cheese (idioms)- Things that are opposites or completely different - एक-दूसरे से बिल्कुल अलग / विपरीत चीज़ें

questions.question: Select the correct Passive form of the given sentence. When will the manager attend the programme?
options: When will the programme be attended by the manager?
When would the programme be attended by the manager?
When can the programme be attended by the manager?
When should the programme be attended by the manager?
questions.explanation: A) When will the programme be attended by the manager? Active से Passive Voice में बदलने के लिए, Active वाक्य का Object Passive वाक्य का Subject बन जाता है। Verb को Active से Passive में बदलते समय सही Tense और Auxiliary Verb का प्रयोग किया जाता है। Active वाक्य में “the manager” Subject है, “will attend” Verb (Future Simple Tense) है और “the programme” Object है। Passive में बदलने पर Object “the programme” Subject बन गया है, Verb को “will be attended” (Future Simple Passive) में बदला गया है और “by the manager” के रूप में Agent जोड़ा गया है। In English To change a sentence from Active to Passive Voice (interrogative): • The object of the active sentence becomes the subject of the passive sentence. • The tense must remain the same. • Modal/auxiliary verbs should not be changed. In this sentence: • “the manager” → Subject (Active) • “will attend” → Verb (Simple Future) • “the programme” → Object • “When” → Interrogative word After conversion: • “the programme” → Subject • “will be attended” → Passive verb (Simple Future Passive) • “by the manager” → Agent • “When” remains unchanged Correct passive sentence: When will the programme be attended by the manager? Other Option Analysis: • Option (2): Changes will to would (tense change). • Option (3): Changes will to can (modal change). • Option (4): Changes will to should (modal change).

questions.question: Choose the most suitable option to replace the highlighted part of the sentence: The less clothes that I made for the wedding have gone out of style.
questions.explanation: A) The less clothes’ के बदले ‘The few clothes’ का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि clothes countable noun है और countable nouns के लिए few/fewer/fewest का प्रयोग होता है जबकि less uncountable nouns के साथ प्रयोग होता है; जैसे— Few friends came to see him. • ‘The few clothes’ will be used instead of ‘The less clothes’ because clothes is a countable noun and for countable nouns we use few/fewer/fewest, whereas less is used with uncountable nouns; Like— Few friends came to see him.

questions.question: Fill in the blank with the most appropriate preposition: The treaty was signed _____ mutual understanding and cooperation.
questions.explanation: D) with ‘with’ का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि पूरा वाक्य सहयोग, सहमति और साझे प्रयास की स्थिति को दिखा रहा है। “The treaty was signed with mutual understanding and cooperation” में “with” दो पक्षों के बीच सहमति के आधार पर किए गए कार्य को दर्शाता है। इसलिए, with सबसे उपयुक्त preposition है। • ‘with’ should be used because the sentence expresses a condition of agreement and joint cooperation. The phrase “signed with mutual understanding and cooperation” conveys that the treaty came into effect through shared consent and collaborative intent. Hence, with is the most appropriate choice.
